name: Potion of Love
original_name: อ้ายข่อยฮักเจ้า
overview: Phuwasol had to fly back to Thailand, seeing his father take his life because of financial problem. All of property were seized and sold by bank. He and mother need to move to relative house at province. At here, meeting Chattawan, the naughty girl who seem to dislike his arrogant. He is always teased by her, to face with any supernatural incident at here.

trailers.title: อ้ายข่อยฮักเจ้า เร็วๆ นี้ | Ch3Thailand
